objects.name: NewText
objects.string:
"Shift" to dash
"Space" to jump
"s" to fall fast
"a, d" left right
"e" to interact with the portal

Debugging Controls (not the same across scenes btw)
"p" resets position
"r" lots of health
"z" zooms out
"L" spawns the boss
"I" spawns laser beams
"v" sets the boss to follow
"right click" sets the boss to follow the mouse
"3" boss circles the screen
"2" boss dashes at the player
"o" orbit the player

content.text:
"Shift" to dash
"Space" to jump
"s" to fall fast
"a, d" left right
"e" to interact with the portal

Debugging Controls (not the same across scenes btw)
"p" resets position
"r" lots of health
"z" zooms out
"L" spawns the boss
"I" spawns laser beams
"v" sets the boss to follow
"right click" sets the boss to follow the mouse
"3" boss circles the screen
"2" boss dashes at the player
"o" orbit the player

objects.name: InfoText
objects.string:
"S" To dash downwards
"Shift" To dash sideways
"E" To enter the portal

Dashing allows you to phase through attacks
May also allow you to deal damage

You get four air jumps

Jumping also depends on how long you hold a key
